pi_items.source: Verified against export_result.sh nb_path assignment and setup_task.sh notebook generation script.
Verified against setup_task.sh and install_urbansim.sh download script which places it correctly.
Verified against export_result.sh required columns logic.

privileged_info_summary: I verified that the task uses the real San Francisco UrbanSim dataset (sanfran_public.h5) downloaded directly from GitHub. I confirmed that the expected output paths (notebook, CSV, JSON, plot) and the required CSV columns explicitly match the task instructions and export_result.sh logic. However, I discovered two critical defects. First, the "cars" column does not exist in the "households" table of the real HDF5 dataset, causing the agent and the ground_truth.json generation script to fail when attempting to calculate "avg_cars_per_hh". Second, the task specifies a "program" mode success metric relying on "verifier.py", but "verifier.py" is completely missing from the task environment, rendering the task unscorable.
